Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: curtains by form [300203710], curtains (opening hangings) [300037564], coverings and hangings for openings [300203683], coverings and hangings by location or context [300197364], coverings and hangings by specific type [300185832], coverings and hangings [300205012], furnishings by form or function [300037342], furnishings (works) [300037336], Furnishings (hierarchy name) [300037335], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: pull-up curtains [300203943], curtains by mode of operation [300203899], curtains (opening hangings) [300037564], coverings and hangings for openings [300203683], coverings and hangings by location or context [300197364], coverings and hangings by specific type [300185832], coverings and hangings [300205012], furnishings by form or function [300037342], furnishings (works) [300037336], Furnishings (hierarchy name) [300037335], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Curtains characterized by soft, billowing, crescent-shaped folds produced either by pulling a single curtain straight up, or by pulling a single or divided curtain diagonally up and to the side, by means of rings and cords attached to the back.

Cortinas caracterizadas por pliegues suaves, ondulantes, con forma de media luna producidos ya sea tirando una única cortina en línea recta hacia arriba, o tirando una cortina única o dividida diagonalmente hacia arriba y al lado, por medio de argollas y cordones pegados en el reverso.

Gordijnen met zachte, golvende vouwen in de vorm van een halve maan. De vouwen ontstaan door een enkel gordijn recht omhoog te trekken of door een enkel of tweedelig gordijn diagonaal omhoog en naar de zijkant te trekken door middel van ringen en koorden die aan de achterkant zijn vastgemaakt.
此種簾幕的特色是可以藉由背面的環或拉繩，將單一簾幕垂直拉起，或是將單一或對稱分開的簾幕朝對角上拉至兩側，形成柔軟、如波浪的新月形摺襉。

Term_Source.Page: Katherine Grier, University of Utah, 11/91.; Jane Nylander, Society for the Preservation of New England Antiquities, Boston, 11/91.

Source.Source_ID: 2000030451/Clabburn, National Trust Book of Furnishing Textiles (1988)
